title: Lantern River in the City of Mirrors
text: I was floating down a river made of lantern light. The city walls were mirrors that reflected a different version of myself in every pane. A quiet voice talked about a path I could not yet name.

title: The Old Tree's Whisper
text: In the middle of a crowded market, a tree grew from the ground with roots like braided ropes. Its leaves whispered secrets about a distant journey, and I felt both rooted and ready to leave.

title: Rain of Paper Birds
text: Paper birds fell from a cloudy sky, each carrying a line of song. When I reached for one, the paper turned to water, and the city beneath became a map of memories.
